request_payload.exposure_text: As a former NATO strategic planner, I've seen firsthand how vital our alliances are for national security. Critics who push for unilateralism often ignore the cold reality: our partners share the burden, giving us leverage we'd lose alone. The data shows that countries with strong alliances face 40% fewer security threats. We can't afford to weaken these bonds - duty demands we strengthen them. #StrongerTogether #NationalSecurity
